title: Epitaph for Merkouriales
support: Two joining fragments of marble plaque, damaged on the lower left corner. The fragments were set in plaster in modern times.

handNote.lettering: Letters with apices, squared E, A with broken bar, triangle-shaped interpuncts.

date._: Second half of 1st — end 2nd century CE

provenanceFound._: Original discovery not recorded, but probably from Catania.
